ground_truth.title: Silent Disco Rentals in West Palm Beach, FL – LED Headphones
ground_truth.main_content: SILENCE is the trusted name in silent disco headphone rentals across West Palm Beach, FL. From private parties to public events, we bring the wireless fun right to you. We offer state-of-the-art LED headsets with three channel wireless headphones that let you toggle between live music, recorded mixes, or stream a playlist from any device. Our premium sound quality, noise cancelling headphones send clear audio for 400 yards with personal volume and sound controls. Built-in LEDs change and light up based on the channel, letting you find your vibe tribe by color. We provide the best silent disco rentals in West Palm Beach FL as the premier silent disco headphone rental and silent events company. Our unique live experiences feature state-of-the-art LED headsets and top-notch silent events. Services include DIY hosted events where you can rent or buy headphones, custom branding with your logo and professional printing, and full-scale onsite support with live DJs, 24/7 event support, staging, lighting and wireless equipment. Each rental kit comes with extra headphones, three transmitters to connect up to 3 devices at once, professional pre-recorded DJ mixes covering multiple genres, and three MP3 players with pre-loaded phantom DJ mixes. All rentals come with 100% free shipping, 24/7 support, equipment arrives ten days in advance with setup guides via QR code. We cover West Palm Beach and nearby areas including Palm Beach, Mangonia Park, Schall Circle, Riviera Beach, Haverhill, and Lake Clarke Shores.
with: SILENCE is the trusted name in silent disco headphone rentals across West Palm Beach, FL.
Three channel wireless headphones let you toggle between live music, recorded mixes, or stream a playlist from any device.
High quality, noise cancelling headphones send clear audio for 400 yards with personal volume and sound controls.
All headphone rentals of any quantity come with 100% free shipping on the house!
Our support reps are standing by, 24 hours a day, ready to help your event run smoothly.
